programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Another season of the documentary that shows the lives of people living in Alaska who hunt and prepare for the harsh winter.Temperatures in this area drop to -60 degrees Celsius.

programme.title: The Secret Genius of Modern Life
programme.desc: Everyday objects are prosaic companions of our everyday life and we rarely think about how they were created.However, they often hide fascinating stories.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: The host shows creatures that amaze scientists.It presents interesting facts and explains where myths about certain animals come from.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Another season of the documentary that shows the lives of people living in Alaska who hunt and prepare for the harsh winter.Temperatures in this area drop to -60 degrees Celsius.

programme.title: Planet Earth 2
programme.desc: A fascinating natural spectacle.The creators of the program show the wealth of fauna and flora that inhabit the world.They visit all continents, where they observe commonly known and very rare species of animals and plants.Using the development of technology, they show life on Earth from a completely new perspective.They allow you to look at the world through the eyes of the creatures that inhabit it.Cameras placed very close record the normally elusive behavior of wild creatures.High-quality photos allow viewers to be in the very center of events - births, hunts or fights for leadership in the herd.All this is accompanied by commentary by David Attenborough, the famous naturalist, traveler and journalist.The series was divided into six parts.The first one reveals the richness of life on islands - from volcanic ones, through equatorial paradises, to Antarctica.The second episode focuses on mountains, the third - jungles, the fourth about deserts, and the fifth about steppes and savannas.The last one will present the life of animals in cities.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Daily struggles of daredevils from various regions of Alaska.The inhabitants of the four houses face further hardships of life in a frosty climate and fight to survive a long and dangerous winter.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Daily struggles of daredevils from various regions of Alaska.The inhabitants of the four houses face further hardships of life in a frosty climate and fight to survive a long and dangerous winter.

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
programme.desc: The history of the Sphinx, the Shroud of Turin, the map of El Dorado, and a controversial piece of papyrus.

programme.title: Planet Earth 2
programme.desc: A fascinating natural spectacle.The creators of the program show the wealth of fauna and flora that inhabit the world.They visit all continents, where they observe commonly known and very rare species of animals and plants.Using the development of technology, they show life on Earth from a completely new perspective.They allow you to look at the world through the eyes of the creatures that inhabit it.Cameras placed very close record the normally elusive behavior of wild creatures.High-quality photos allow viewers to be in the very center of events - births, hunts or fights for leadership in the herd.All this is accompanied by commentary by David Attenborough, the famous naturalist, traveler and journalist.The series was divided into six parts.The first one reveals the richness of life on islands - from volcanic ones, through equatorial paradises, to Antarctica.The second episode focuses on mountains, the third - jungles, the fourth about deserts, and the fifth about steppes and savannas.The last one will present the life of animals in cities.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Another season of the documentary that shows the lives of people living in Alaska who hunt and prepare for the harsh winter.Temperatures in this area drop to -60 degrees Celsius.

programme.title: Where the Wild Men Are with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: Presenter, writer and adventurer Ben Fogle travels to different parts of the world to meet people who have decided to leave the comfort of Western civilization and start a new life.

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
programme.desc: The history of the Sphinx, the Shroud of Turin, the map of El Dorado, and a controversial piece of papyrus.

programme.title: Planet Earth III
programme.desc: The third part of the nature documentary, produced over almost five years, concludes the trilogy almost two decades after the first series was broadcast.Its creators used pioneering film technologies, including:light drones, super-fast cameras and remotely controlled deep-sea submarines.In eight episodes, viewers will visit the most remote jungles, the darkest ocean depths, the world's largest caves and the hottest deserts and steppes.They will learn the story about nature's will to survive and the adaptive abilities of various species.The Earth is at a tipping point and changes in the natural world are felt in every ecosystem and affect numerous creatures.The series highlights the growing need to protect and restore nature.In the last episode, viewers will meet inspiring people from various corners of the world who are the face of change and saving the Earth.They are committed to risking their lives to protect the planet.Sir David Attenborough will guide the series.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In Space
Where the Wild Men Are with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: Presenter, writer and adventurer Ben Fogle travels to different parts of the world to meet people who have decided to leave the comfort of Western civilization and start a new life.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Another season of the documentary that shows the lives of people living in Alaska who hunt and prepare for the harsh winter.Temperatures in this area drop to -60 degrees Celsius.

programme.title: Jimmy Doherty's New Zealand Escape
programme.desc: Jimmy takes a trip to the tropical north to visit New Zealand.His culinary discoveries will not be the only attraction of the program.There will also be a visit to the winery and a show of seasonal specialties.

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
programme.desc: The history of the Sphinx, the Shroud of Turin, the map of El Dorado, and a controversial piece of papyrus.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Daily struggles of daredevils from various regions of Alaska.The inhabitants of the four houses face further hardships of life in a frosty climate and fight to survive a long and dangerous winter.

programme.title: Planet Earth 2
programme.desc: A fascinating natural spectacle.The creators of the program show the wealth of fauna and flora that inhabit the world.They visit all continents, where they observe commonly known and very rare species of animals and plants.Using the development of technology, they show life on Earth from a completely new perspective.They allow you to look at the world through the eyes of the creatures that inhabit it.Cameras placed very close record the normally elusive behavior of wild creatures.High-quality photos allow viewers to be in the very center of events - births, hunts or fights for leadership in the herd.All this is accompanied by commentary by David Attenborough, the famous naturalist, traveler and journalist.The series was divided into six parts.The first one reveals the richness of life on islands - from volcanic ones, through equatorial paradises, to Antarctica.The second episode focuses on mountains, the third - jungles, the fourth about deserts, and the fifth about steppes and savannas.The last one will present the life of animals in cities.

programme.title: Where the Wild Men Are with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: Presenter, writer and adventurer Ben Fogle travels to different parts of the world to meet people who have decided to leave the comfort of Western civilization and start a new life.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: The host shows creatures that amaze scientists.It presents interesting facts and explains where myths about certain animals come from.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Another season of the documentary that shows the lives of people living in Alaska who hunt and prepare for the harsh winter.Temperatures in this area drop to -60 degrees Celsius.

programme.title: Empire with David Olusoga
programme.desc: British historian David Olusoga tells the story of Britain, examining how a small island became the center of the greatest empire in the history of the world.

programme.title: Planet Earth 2
programme.desc: A fascinating natural spectacle.The creators of the program show the wealth of fauna and flora that inhabit the world.They visit all continents, where they observe commonly known and very rare species of animals and plants.Using the development of technology, they show life on Earth from a completely new perspective.They allow you to look at the world through the eyes of the creatures that inhabit it.Cameras placed very close record the normally elusive behavior of wild creatures.High-quality photos allow viewers to be in the very center of events - births, hunts or fights for leadership in the herd.All this is accompanied by commentary by David Attenborough, the famous naturalist, traveler and journalist.The series was divided into six parts.The first one reveals the richness of life on islands - from volcanic ones, through equatorial paradises, to Antarctica.The second episode focuses on mountains, the third - jungles, the fourth about deserts, and the fifth about steppes and savannas.The last one will present the life of animals in cities.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Daily struggles of daredevils from various regions of Alaska.The inhabitants of the four houses face further hardships of life in a frosty climate and fight to survive a long and dangerous winter.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Daily struggles of daredevils from various regions of Alaska.The inhabitants of the four houses face further hardships of life in a frosty climate and fight to survive a long and dangerous winter.

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
programme.desc: The history of the Sphinx, the Shroud of Turin, the map of El Dorado, and a controversial piece of papyrus.

programme.title: Planet Earth 2
programme.desc: A fascinating natural spectacle.The creators of the program show the wealth of fauna and flora that inhabit the world.They visit all continents, where they observe commonly known and very rare species of animals and plants.Using the development of technology, they show life on Earth from a completely new perspective.They allow you to look at the world through the eyes of the creatures that inhabit it.Cameras placed very close record the normally elusive behavior of wild creatures.High-quality photos allow viewers to be in the very center of events - births, hunts or fights for leadership in the herd.All this is accompanied by commentary by David Attenborough, the famous naturalist, traveler and journalist.The series was divided into six parts.The first one reveals the richness of life on islands - from volcanic ones, through equatorial paradises, to Antarctica.The second episode focuses on mountains, the third - jungles, the fourth about deserts, and the fifth about steppes and savannas.The last one will present the life of animals in cities.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The second series once again takes viewers on an extraordinary journey to the world of dinosaurs and discovers the secrets of fossils from millions of years ago.Following ancient footsteps, the creators present computer-generated animals of the Mesozoic era to show how they lived, hunted and fought for survival.Each episode focuses on the story of a prehistoric creature whose remains were found at one of six archaeological sites.Researchers taking part in ongoing excavations there will discuss the background of the work and the latest discoveries.From Montana to Europe In the first episode we will visit the rocky hills of Montana to learn the story of an orphaned Triceratops.A small dinosaur tries to survive in the forest, being tracked by the king of predators - the tyrannosaurus.In the next part, we will move to the area occupied by modern Morocco, i.e. to northern Africa.There, a young male Spinosaurus tries to provide food for its babies.In the next episodes, we will travel through North America, we will learn, among other things, the story of the herbivorous gastonia, which must face the element of fire and utahraptors, as well as the fate of the incomparable hunter - Albertosaurus.We will end the expedition on the Iberian Peninsula, where the Lusotan is looking for a partner.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Another season of the documentary that shows the lives of people living in Alaska who hunt and prepare for the harsh winter.Temperatures in this area drop to -60 degrees Celsius.

programme.title: Where the Wild Men Are with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: Presenter, writer and adventurer Ben Fogle travels to different parts of the world to meet people who have decided to leave the comfort of Western civilization and start a new life.

programme.title: Empire with David Olusoga
programme.desc: British historian David Olusoga tells the story of Britain, examining how a small island became the center of the greatest empire in the history of the world.

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
programme.desc: The history of the Sphinx, the Shroud of Turin, the map of El Dorado, and a controversial piece of papyrus.

programme.title: Planet Earth III
programme.desc: The third part of the nature documentary, produced over almost five years, concludes the trilogy almost two decades after the first series was broadcast.Its creators used pioneering film technologies, including:light drones, super-fast cameras and remotely controlled deep-sea submarines.In eight episodes, viewers will visit the most remote jungles, the darkest ocean depths, the world's largest caves and the hottest deserts and steppes.They will learn the story about nature's will to survive and the adaptive abilities of various species.The Earth is at a tipping point and changes in the natural world are felt in every ecosystem and affect numerous creatures.The series highlights the growing need to protect and restore nature.In the last episode, viewers will meet inspiring people from various corners of the world who are the face of change and saving the Earth.They are committed to risking their lives to protect the planet.Sir David Attenborough will guide the series.

programme.title: Islands: Nature's Wild Laboratories
programme.desc: The creators of the series take viewers on a journey through the unique ecosystems of islands, from the Arctic to the tropics.The trek includes Borneo, the Okavango Delta, Vancouver Islands, Baffin Island, K'gari and Sri Lanka.

programme.title: Where the Wild Men Are with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: Presenter, writer and adventurer Ben Fogle travels to different parts of the world to meet people who have decided to leave the comfort of Western civilization and start a new life.
